title: Prove extension field axioms and Karatsuba equivalence in Lean4
description:
Prove QuadraticExt and CubicExt satisfy CommRing/Field (via Equiv transfer from pure QExt/CExt types). Prove Karatsuba multiplication equals schoolbook multiplication (ring tactic). Prove norm-based inversion correctness. Prove order() = base_order^degree for both extension types (given no U128 overflow). Replace Option.map axiom with concrete def matching Rust semantics.

Proof files (in proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/):
- ExtDefs.lean: ValidExtConfig/ValidCubicExtConfig predicates, name abbreviations
- ExtAlgebra.lean: Pure CommRing/Field instances for QExt/CExt pair/triple types
- ExtProgress.lean: @[progress] lemmas linking Aeneas monadic code to algebraic specs
- QuadraticExtField.lean: CommRing/Field for Aeneas QuadraticExt, headline theorems
- CubicExtField.lean: CommRing/Field for Aeneas CubicExt, headline theorems

Success criteria: lake build compiles all extension field proofs with zero sorrys

doc-review.updated_by: manual: all proof files have descriptive headers and theorem-level documentation
